code: import React from'react';import'./about.scss';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const getYearsFromDate=startDateStr=>{const[y,m,d]=startDateStr.split('-').map(Number);const startDate=new Date(y,m-1,d);const now=new Date();let years=now.getFullYear()-startDate.getFullYear();const hasReachedAnniversary=now.getMonth()>startDate.getMonth()||now.getMonth()===startDate.getMonth()&&now.getDate()>=startDate.getDate();if(!hasReachedAnniversary)years--;return years;};const Info=()=>{const workYears=getYearsFromDate('2024-03-11');return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"about_info grid",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"about_box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"bx bx-award about_icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"about_title",children:"Experience"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{className:"about_subtitle",children:[workYears,"+ years"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"about_box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"bx bx-briefcase-alt about_icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"about_title",children:"Projects"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"about_subtitle",children:"10+ completed"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"about_box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"bx bx-support about_icon"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"about_title",children:"Availability"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"about_subtitle",children:"Remote"})]})]});};export default Info;
